title: Bronze - Armor Retexture
description: Retextures all of the armor in the Bronze mod.
body:
Retextures the helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots in the [Bronze](https://modrinth.com/mod/bronze) mod by June/Khazoda.

These armor textures were adapted from the armor set textures in the [Ancient Copper Gear](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ancient-copper-gear) resource pack made by Black_Talons, with permission.

The logo of "Bronze" was lifted from the Bronze mod.

------------------
I'm abiding by the license; no need to ask me for "permission" to take and extend this.

Just keep the attributions for the sources.
